description: Classic sneakers from numero uno, referenced from the all-sport lifestyle for the cosmopolitan male. An icon of casual dressing, wear this with a straightforward combination of jeans and a favourite tee. Upper Synthetic leather upper with synthetic leather and nubuck overlays Reinforced overlay on the heel cup for abrasion free comfort Central lacing system for a customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for instep comfort Mesh lining for breathability Coloured overlay at the midfoot region for style and structure Branding on the side, tongue and collar Midsole PU midsole with foxing on the toe box for shock absorption and all day comfort Outsole PU outsole with textured pattern for durability and grip shoe care Wipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
